arts.ttl: Arsenal star Zinchenko makes shock Man City allegation
arts.sum: Oleksandr Zinchenko has claimed that Manchester City kept him on an academy deal until he had made 43 senior appearances for the club. "The City lawyers said: 'Look, this is an academy player contract, right?

arts.ttl: Man City's legal war with the Premier League over sponsorship rules rumbles on as club officials clash in 'feisty' emergency meeting... with fears growing that a resolution will not be reached until next year
arts.sum: MIKE KEEGAN: No timeline was given to Premier League clubs on a resolution to their legal war with Manchester City over sponsorship rules at a 'feisty' emergency meeting of clubs this afternoon.

arts.ttl: Tottenham transfer news: Spurs set Pedro Porro asking price amid Man City interest?
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur are reportedly demanding £80m for right-back Pedro Porro following interest from Manchester City for the services of the Spanish defender.

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola anger and Man City injury concerns as Champions League returns

arts.ttl: Report: Liverpool now ready to submit bid to sign player who left Manchester City in £75,000 deal

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne's transfer preference becomes clear as Man City star changes exit plan
arts.sum: Kevin De Bruyne is set to see his Manchester City contract expire in 2025 and will have many suitors chasing his signature as he ponders what to do for the final stage of his career

arts.ttl: £80m price tag placed on Tottenham star to scare off Man City and Real Madrid
arts.sum: Tottenham have placed an £80m price tag on star defender Pedro Porro as the North London club try to fend off interest from Man City and Real Madrid in the Spanish star.
